raw.message: Jetzt probieren: Baby Whopper®, Baby Big King®, Baby Steakhouse im Brioche Bun.

hook.summary: A woman's indecision at a burger counter is met with a dramatic solution from the employee.
hook.visual_action: Woman looking confused at the counter, then a sudden shift to dramatic blue lighting.

scene_flow: Woman at counter trying to decide between three burgers.
Employee suggests a third option, triggering a dramatic mental sequence.
Employee reveals the 'Baby Burger' box containing all three burgers.
Woman eats the mini burgers with satisfaction.
End card shows the '3 in 1' offer and brand logo.
audience_proxy: Hungry fast-food fans who have trouble deciding on just one menu item.
